title: Section 3B
content: 1[3B. Deposit by minor.--(1) A minor who has attained the age of ten years may open and operate an account in the Government Savings Bank, if so permitted under a Savings Scheme. (2) Subject to the provisions of sub-section (1), the guardian of a minor may open and operate an account on behalf of the minor, till he becomes a major.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 13 of 2018, s. 118, for section 3 (w.e.f. 1-4-2018).
